Resources.Name: Arrangement
Resources.Description: Each arrangement belongs to a song and is a different version of that song.

Attributes.Name: print_margin
Attributes.Description:
Possible Values:

- `0.0in`

- `0.25in`

- `0.5in`

- `0.75in`

- `1.0in`

Attributes.Name: print_orientation
Attributes.Description:
Possible Values:

- `Portrait`

- `Landscape`

Attributes.Name: print_page_size
Attributes.Description:
Possible Values:

- `Widescreen (16x9)`

- `Fullscreen (4x3)`

- `A4`

- `Letter`

- `Legal`

- `11x17`

Attributes.Name: chord_chart
Attributes.Description: A string of lyrics and chords. Supports standard and ChordPro formats.

Attributes.Name: sequence
Attributes.Description:
An array of strings containing a label and a number describing the section:

['Verse 1', 'Chorus 1', 'Verse 2']

Resources.Name: ArrangementSections
Resources.Description: Sections of an Arrangement, derived from its chord chart

Attributes.Name: sections
Attributes.Description:
Given an arrangement with the folowing `chord_chart`:

```
VERSE 1
D          Bm       G          D
Be thou my vision O Lord of my heart
A             Bm         G              A
naught be all else to me save that Thou art
```

The value will be:

```json
[
  {
    "label": "Verse",
    "lyrics": "Be thou my vision O Lord of my heart
naught be all else to me save that Thou art",
    "breaks_at": null
  }
]
```

Resources.Name: Attachment
Resources.Description: A file, whether it's stored on Planning Center or linked from another location.

Attributes.Name: file_upload_identifier
Attributes.Description:
Planning Center File UUID. Required only when creating a file attachment. See the "File Uploads" section of the API documentation for more information.

Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

Relationships.Name: attachable
Relationships.Note: Type will be the type of resource to which it is attached.

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-attachable_type) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-created_at) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-deleted_at) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-filename) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-filetype) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-size) to reverse the order

Resources.Name: AttachmentActivity
Resources.Description: Returned from the `open` attachment action.

Resources.Name: AttachmentType
Resources.Description: Create an Attachment Type for each type of file you might want only specific people to see. When you attach a file, you can specify an attachment type to then be able to link the file to a position.

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-name) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-name) to reverse the order

Possible values:

- daily

- yearly

Resources.Name: BlockoutDate
Resources.Description: The actual dates generated by the blockout or its recurrence pattern. Generated up to a year in advance

Resources.Name: Item
Resources.Description: An item in a plan.

Attributes.Name: item_type
Attributes.Description:
There are 4 possible values:

- `song`: The item is a song

- `header`: The item is a header

- `media`: The item is a piece of media

- `item`: The default item type

This value can only be set when an item is created. The only value that you can pass is `header`. If no value is passed then `item` will be used. To create a media item you'll attach a video media to the item, and to create a song item, you'll attach a song.

Attributes.Name: service_position
Attributes.Description:
There are 3 possible values:

- `pre`: the item happens before the service starts

- `post`: the item happens after the service ends

- `during`: the item happens during the service

Attributes.Name: custom_arrangement_sequence
Attributes.Description:
An array of strings containing a label and a number describing the section:

['Verse 1', 'Chorus 1', 'Verse 2']

Resources.Name: ItemNote
Resources.Description:
A plan item note that belongs to a category.

Note: You can only assign the category on create. If you want to change category; delete the current note, and create a new one passing in the `item_note_category_id` then.

Relationships.Name: item_note_category

Resources.Name: ItemNoteCategory
Resources.Description: A category of plan item notes for an entire Service Type.

Resources.Name: Key
Resources.Description: Each song arrangement can have multiple keys. A key is the pitch center of the song.

Attributes.Name: alternate_keys
Attributes.Description:
An array of objects.

`
{
  "name": "My Alternate Key",
  "key": "B"
}
`

Attributes.Name: ending_key
Attributes.Description:
Possible Values:

`Ab`, `A`, `A#`, `Bb`, `B`, `C`, `C#`, `Db`, `D`, `D#`, `Eb`, `E`, `F`, `F#`, `Gb`, `G`, `G#`, `Abm`, `Am`, `A#m`, `Bbm`, `Bm`, `Cm`, `C#m`, `Dbm`, `Dm`, `D#m`, `Ebm`, `Em`, `Fm`, `F#m`, `Gbm`, `Gm`, `G#m`

To set the key to minor append `m` to the key. e.g. `Cm`

Attributes.Name: starting_key
Attributes.Description:
Possible Values:

`Ab`, `A`, `A#`, `Bb`, `B`, `C`, `C#`, `Db`, `D`, `D#`, `Eb`, `E`, `F`, `F#`, `Gb`, `G`, `G#`, `Abm`, `Am`, `A#m`, `Bbm`, `Bm`, `Cm`, `C#m`, `Dbm`, `Dm`, `D#m`, `Ebm`, `Em`, `Fm`, `F#m`, `Gbm`, `Gm`, `G#m`

To set the key to minor append `m` to the key. e.g. `Cm`

Resources.Name: PersonTeamPositionAssignment
Resources.Description: A person's assignment to a position within a team.

Attributes.Name: schedule_preference
Attributes.Description:
Possible Values:
  "Every week"
  "Every other week"
  "Every 3rd week"
  "Every 4th week"
  "Every 5th week"
  "Every 6th week"
  "Once a month"
  "Twice a month"
  "Three times a month"
  "Choose Weeks"

Attributes.Name: preferred_weeks
Attributes.Description:
When `schedule_preference` is set to "Choose Weeks" then this
indicates which weeks are preferred (checked).

e.g. ['1', '3', '5'] to prefer odd numbered weeks.

Resources.Name: Plan
Resources.Description: A single plan within a Service Type.

Attributes.Name: items_count
Attributes.Description: The total number of items, including regular items, songs, media, and headers, that the current user can see in the plan.

Attributes.Name: permissions
Attributes.Description: The current user's permissions for this plan's Service Type.

Attributes.Name: public
Attributes.Description: True if Public Access has been enabled.

Attributes.Name: total_length
Attributes.Description: The total of length of all items, excluding pre-service and post-service items.

Attributes.Name: files_expire_at
Attributes.Description: A date 15 days after the last service time. ___Returns in the time zone specified in your organization's localization settings___

Attributes.Name: sort_date
Attributes.Description: A time representing the chronological first Service Time, used to sort plan chronologically. If no Service Times exist, it uses Rehearsal Times, then Other Times, then NOW. ___Returns in the time zone specified in your organization's localization settings___

Attributes.Name: last_time_at
Attributes.Description: ___Returns in the time zone specified in your organization's localization settings___

Attributes.Name: dates
Attributes.Description: The full date string representing all Service Time dates.

Attributes.Name: short_dates
Attributes.Description: The shortened date string representing all Service Time dates. Months are abbreviated, and the year is omitted.

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-created_at) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-sort_date) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-title) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-updated_at) to reverse the order

Resources.Description: A time in a plan.

Attributes.Name: time_type
Attributes.Description:
Possible values are:

- rehearsal

- service

- other

Attributes.Name: team_reminders
Attributes.Description: A Hash that maps a Team ID to a reminder value. If nothing is specified, no reminder is set for that team. A reminder value is an integer (0-7) equal to the number of days before the selected time a reminder should be sent.

Attributes.Description: Planned start time.

Attributes.Name: ends_at

Resources.Name: Series
Resources.Description:
A Series can be specified for each plan to tie plans with similar messages together, even across Service Types.

*Note*: A series is not created until artwork is added from the plan.  You can use `series_title` included in `Plan` attributes to get titles for series without artwork.

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-created_at) to reverse the order

Resources.Name: ServiceType
Resources.Description: A Service Type is a container for plans.

Attributes.Name: custom_item_types
Attributes.Description:
A array of hashes that maps an item title substring matcher to a color:

[{ name: "Announcements", color: "#FFFFFF" }]

Valid substring matchers are any string that could be used as an item title.

A color is the hexadecimal value of a valid color e.g. #FFFFFF
Valid colors values are #e8f6df, #e0f7ff, #e6e2fd, #ffe0e8, #ffedd1, #cfcfcf, #eaebeb, and #ffffff

Attributes.Name: standard_item_types
Attributes.Description:
An array of hashes that maps an item type to a color:

[{ name: "Header", color: "#FFFFFF" }]

Valid names are Header, Song, and Media.

A color is the hexadecimal value of a valid color e.g. #FFFFFF
Valid colors values are #e8f6df, #e0f7ff, #e6e2fd, #ffe0e8, #ffedd1, #cfcfcf, #eaebeb, and #ffffff

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-name) to reverse the order

Resources.Name: Zoom
Resources.Description: Describes a zoom level for an attachment

Attributes.Name: aspect_ratio
Attributes.Description: The aspect ratio of the device this zoom is for. It is rounded to the nearest 3 decimal places.

Attributes.Name: zoom_level
Attributes.Description: The percentage of the zoom. Must be a value between 1.0 and 5.0

Attributes.Name: x_offset
Attributes.Description: The percentage of the document's width the zoomed document should be offset by horizontally.

Attributes.Name: y_offset
Attributes.Description: The percentage of the document's height the zoomed document should be offset by vertically.
